steps.title: Read set A
steps.content: From the dot plot, set A has mean $10\mu\text{F}$ and range $12\mu\text{F}$. Each capacitor in set B is $14\mu\text{F}$ greater than the corresponding capacitor in set A.

steps.title: Shift the mean
steps.content:
Adding $14$ to every value increases the mean by $14$:
$$10+14=24$$
So set B has mean $24\mu\text{F}$.

steps.title: Keep the range unchanged
steps.content: Adding the same amount to every value increases both the maximum and minimum by $14$, so the difference between them stays the same. The range remains $12\mu\text{F}$. That confirms C.
